sku_id: RIFPOD Lawn Aerator Automatic Dirt and Leaf Clean Design,Grass Aerator for Yard and Garden,Soil renovation Hydrophobic permeation Revives Lawn Health

videos.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style satisfying result ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Start with a satisfying real-life result. Close-up of RIFPOD Lawn Aerator with Automatic Dirt and Leaf Clean Design pressing into compacted lawn soil, pulling out clean soil plugs, and the dirt releasing cleanly from the spring-cleaning spikes.
3-6s: Show the real pain point behind the result. hard crusty soil that repels water, yellowing grass patches, sparse growth where nothing thrives watering more but the water just pools on top, or ignoring the problem and watching the lawn slowly die
6-10s: Show the product solving the problem clearly. step on RIFPOD Lawn Aerator with Automatic Dirt and Leaf Clean Design to push spikes into the soil, lift to release clean soil plugs, and repeat across the lawn aerated soil with clean holes, ready for water and nutrients to reach the roots
Keep the pacing fast, realistic, and product-focused.
Do not use exaggerated magic effects.
Do not invent product functions.
Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
videos.negative_prompt: Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
